productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Blue Handbag
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this handbag from United Colours Of Benetton will help. Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or college. With a great silhouette, you will notice that people will be unable to resist it Measurement Height: 25 cm Length: 24 cm Made of 100% polyester for durability and comfort One main zippered compartment One mobile pouch with one inner zippered compartment for essentials One polyester twill tape strap with buckles at the side Leather band with stitch detailing on the mouth for durability Branded zippers and sliders for easy use, metallic brand badge on the front Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
